name: Blood and Hunger

abilities.name: December's Hunger
abilities.text: After killing an enemy model within 2" of a friendly Ice Pillar marker, the enemy infuses no (soulstone) and this model heals 1.

abilities.name: Famine
abilities.text: After this model receives a raise in an opposed duel, the opposing model gains a Hunger token.

actions.name: Grim Feast
actions.effects: Target a Remains marker. Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target. This model heals 2.

triggers.name: Unaccountably Peckish
triggers.text: Enemy models within ((r))4" must pass a TN 11 Wp duel or gain a Hunger token.

extraction_notes: December's Hunger references 'infuses no (soulstone)' - using (soulstone) icon as specified
Unaccountably Peckish trigger shows '((r))4"' in the original, representing an aura range of 4 inches
